1	# e2e-full preset — 最全面的 B1 流程 pipeline
2	#
3	# 流程: Dev → Gate → Test(verify) → Review → Judge → Ship
4	#
5	# 跟 safe-team 的区别:
6	#   safe-team  (方案 A):  dev.build.done → review → test → judge
7	#   e2e-full   (方案 B1): dev.build.done → test(verify) → review(audit) → judge(AND 闭包)
8	#
9	# 决策依据 (2026-04-21 架构 review):
10	#   - 对齐工业界 PR 流程: CI (test) 绿了才 reviewer 介入, 不看红灯 PR
11	#   - Cost 优化: test.failed → dev rework, Review (Opus) 不跑 → 省成本
12	#   - LHE L09: Evaluator (test) 是最后独立 agent 的文献立场
13	#   - Judge (AND closure: ContractD + FunctionalD) 仍是最终硬门
14	#
15	# 使用:
16	#   cp examples/e2e-full.yaml zf.yaml && zf start
17	#   或 zf init --preset e2e-full (待 presets.py 加 b1 生成器)
18	#
19	# E2E 测试:
20	#   bash tests/e2e/run.sh examples/e2e-full.yaml --tier=T2
21	#
22	# 特性展示:
23	#   - B1 顺序 (test 先 review 后)
24	#   - GAN 设计阶段 (arch ↔ review[design_critique] 对抗, workflow.gan_rounds=2)
25	#   - Multi-instance (dev.replicas=2, 演示 I30 instance_id 路由)
26	#   - Per-role budget_usd (I35 硬阻塞)
27	#   - Quality gates (Gate L1 的 ContractD + FunctionalD AND 闭包)
28	#   - Judge 作为最终 AND closure door
29	
30	version: '1.0'
31	preset: e2e-full
32	project:
33	  name: zaofu-e2e-full
34	  state_dir: .zf
35	
36	session:
37	  tmux_session: zf-e2e
38	  tmux_layout: window_per_role  # 可改 pane_grid 演示单 window 多 pane
39	
40	orchestrator:
41	  backend: claude-code
42	  permission_mode: bypass
43	
44	# 全局成本硬上限 (I35)
45	global_budget_usd: 15.0
46	
47	# Quality gates — Gate L1 静态机械验证 (zero-LLM cost)
48	# Judge 通过 DiscriminatorRunner 消费 FunctionalD 结果做 AND 闭包
49	quality_gates:
50	  static:
51	    enabled: true
52	    # required_checks 每条必须 exit 0; 空列表 = FunctionalD vacuously passes
53	    required_checks:
54	      - "PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest --no-cov -q"
55	      - "python3 -m mypy src/"
56	      - "python3 -m ruff check src/ tests/"
57	
58	security:
59	  event_signing:
60	    enabled: true
61	    secret_env: ZF_EVENT_SECRET
62	
63	workflow:
64	  gan_rounds: 2  # Architect ↔ Critic 设计阶段辩论 2 轮
65

usage: zf feature [-h] {add,list,show,update} ...

positional arguments:
  {add,list,show,update}
    add                 Add a new feature
    list                List features
    show                Show a feature in detail
    update              Update a feature

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

usage: zf kanban [-h] [--board] [--watch] [--all] [--days DAYS]
                 {add,move,assign,show,ready,open,pending} ...

positional arguments:
  {add,move,assign,show,ready,open,pending}
    add                 Add a task to backlog
    move                Move a task to a new status
    assign              Assign a task to a role
    show                Show task details
    ready               List ready tasks
    open                List non-terminal tasks
    pending             List backlog tasks

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --board               Show columnar board view
  --watch               Watch mode (refresh every 2s)
  --all                 Include every archived task (default: active only)
  --days DAYS           Include archived tasks from the last N days

usage: zf feature add [-h] [--message MESSAGE] [--priority PRIORITY]
                      [--description DESCRIPTION]
                      title

positional arguments:
  title

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --message MESSAGE, -m MESSAGE
                        Original user message
  --priority PRIORITY, -p PRIORITY
                        Priority 1 (highest) - 5 (lowest)
  --description DESCRIPTION, -d DESCRIPTION
---
usage: zf kanban add [-h] [--key KEY] [--blocked-by [BLOCKED_BY ...]] title

positional arguments:
  title                 Task title

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --key KEY             Idempotency key
  --blocked-by [BLOCKED_BY ...]
                        Blocking task IDs

usage: zf emit [-h] [--payload PAYLOAD] [--task TASK] [--actor ACTOR] type

positional arguments:
  type               Event type (e.g. dev.build.done)

options:
  -h, --help         show this help message and exit
  --payload PAYLOAD  JSON payload
  --task TASK        Task ID
  --actor ACTOR      Actor name

contract.goal: 实现 greet(name) 函数并提供单元测试

tests/test_greet.py 包含 greet("world") == "hello, world!" 断言
acceptance_criteria: 1. src/greet.py 实现 greet(name) 返回 f"hello, {name}!" → verify: python -c "from greet import greet; assert greet(\"world\") == \"hello, world!\"" 成功
2. tests/test_greet.py 添加断言 → verify: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_greet.py -q 全绿
3. 不破坏现有测试 → verify: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest --no-cov -q 全绿
constraints: 仅新增 src/greet.py 与 tests/test_greet.py 两个文件; 不要改动其他源文件
函数签名: def greet(name: str) -> str
返回字符串格式必须为 "hello, <name>!"

28	```

37	## Optional: Record What You Learned
38	
39	If during this task you learned something worth remembering across sessions (a decision, a pattern, a fix, or a context note), emit a memory.note event before exiting:
40	
41	```bash
42	zf emit memory.note --actor dev-1 --payload '{"mem_type":"decision","content":"use bcrypt for password hashing"}'
43	```
44	
45	Memory types and decay (max_days):
46	- `decision`  — architecture / design choices (30 days)
47	- `pattern`   — reusable code patterns (60 days)
48	- `fix`       — bug fixes worth remembering (7 days)
49	- `context`   — environment / project context (14 days)
50	
51	Memory is stored in `.zf/memory/dev.md` (today's active file) and rotates to `.zf/memory/dev/YYYY-MM-DD.md` the next day. Future sessions read recent memory to rebuild context.

[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=69", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "zaofu"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "ZaoFu multi-agent harness scaffold"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = ["PyYAML>=6.0"]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest>=9.0", "pytest-cov>=6.0"]
stream-json = ["claude-code-sdk>=0.0.25"]

[project.scripts]
zf = "zf.cli:main"

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "src"}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
addopts = "--cov=zf --cov-report=term-missing"

payload.text: 记录 gate 与 B1 preset 冲突，以便未来 orchestrator 运行参考。

payload.input:
{"file_path": "~/.claude/projects/-home-min-workspace-zaofu/memory/feedback_lh0t2_b1_gate_conflict.md", "content": "---
name: LH-0.T2 gate 与 e2e-full B1 拓扑冲突
description: e2e-full preset 下 orchestrator 不能 assign test, LH-0.T2 gate 仍按 A-flow 要求 review.approved, 只能 emit dispatch_failed
type: feedback
---

e2e-full (B1) preset 的拓扑是 `dev.build.done → test → review → judge`，
但 LH-0.T2 gate 依然硬编码 A-flow 要求：assign 到 test 角色必须先有
`review.approved` 事件。因此 orchestrator 收到 `dev.build.done` 后：

- `zf kanban assign TASK-XXX test` 会被拒 (`missing prior event 'review.approved'`)
- 不能 `zf kanban move` 跳状态（会打破 Layer 1 派发队列）

**Why:** 2026-04-21 experiment/b1-smoke 实测发现：gate 未识别 preset 拓扑，
把 safe-team 的顺序当成唯一合法顺序。

**How to apply:** 在 e2e-full/B1 项目下收到 `dev.build.done` 后，
不要尝试 assign test。改为 emit `orchestrator.dispatch_failed` + 详细 reason，
然后 `orchestrator.round.complete`，把问题抛给 kernel/人类处理。
若 kernel 已修复（gate 按 zf.yaml 动态识别下一站），再按派发协议正常 assign。
"}
